# Workspace Module Map

The module graph is generated from the workspace package manifests. Source imports must use declared workspace dependencies; packages cannot import application source, and workspace dependencies must remain acyclic.

## Modules

| Module | Directory | Declared workspace dependencies |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `@sdp/api` | `apps/sdp-api` | `@sdp/custody`, `@sdp/env-config`, `@sdp/issuance`, `@sdp/payments`, `@sdp/rpc`, `@sdp/solana`, `@sdp/types` |
| `@sdp/api-integration` | `packages/sdp-api-integration` | `@sdp/api`, `@sdp/payments`, `@sdp/rpc`, `@sdp/types` |
| `@sdp/custody` | `packages/sdp-custody` | `@sdp/types` |
| `@sdp/env-config` | `packages/sdp-env-config` | None |
| `@sdp/issuance` | `packages/sdp-issuance` | `@sdp/payments`, `@sdp/rpc`, `@sdp/solana`, `@sdp/types` |
| `@sdp/payments` | `packages/sdp-payments` | `@sdp/rpc`, `@sdp/solana`, `@sdp/types` |
| `@sdp/rpc` | `packages/sdp-rpc` | `@sdp/types` |
| `@sdp/solana` | `packages/sdp-solana` | `@sdp/rpc`, `@sdp/types` |
| `@sdp/types` | `packages/sdp-types` | None |
| `sdp-docs` | `apps/sdp-docs` | `@sdp/env-config`, `@sdp/types` |
| `sdp-web` | `apps/sdp-web` | `@sdp/solana`, `@sdp/types` |

## Exceptions

- `@sdp/api-integration` may import the explicit `@sdp/api/test-support` facade for integration-test setup and fixtures.
- Other package-to-app source imports and app compatibility re-exports are rejected by `pnpm check:module-boundaries`.
